data.content: Implemented the beats header search minimum width by adding a 20ch min-width to the shared search form and suspense fallback in src/components/search-bar.tsx. Extended src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts to lock the 20ch contract and preserve the wrapping header usage in src/components/app-header.tsx. Validation run: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts and bun run lint src/components/search-bar.tsx src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts.
